title: Verify: Frontend Playwright suite green
description:
Run the full specs/e2e Playwright suite (auth, articles, comments, social, settings, navigation, url-navigation, error-handling, user-fetch-errors, null-fields, xss-security, health) against the running fullstack app. Requires the backend to be spec-green (blocked by M1).

## Required Skills
Playwright
acceptance_criteria: Entire specs/e2e Playwright suite passes against the running app with the real backend; SELECTORS contract satisfied.

title: ADR: HTMX + JWT-in-localStorage rendering strategy
description: Decide how a server-rendered Jinja2+HTMX UI (served by the same FastAPI app) reconciles with the SELECTORS contract that mandates a JWT in localStorage (key jwtToken) and a window.__conduit_debug__ interface. ## Context Single FastAPI app serves both the JSON API and HTML. The e2e contract expects client-side JWT in localStorage and a JS debug hook, which is unusual for server-rendered apps. ## Decision TBD by the implementer: document the chosen approach for (a) where auth state lives and how HTMX attaches 'Authorization: Token <jwt>'; (b) whether HTML routes call the internal service layer or fetch the JSON API; (c) protected-route redirects without a server session; (d) the client JS footprint for __conduit_debug__ + default-avatar. ## Rationale TBD: justify the choice against simplicity, SELECTORS compliance, and the no-network-hop single-app constraint. ## Alternatives Considered TBD: e.g. server-session auth vs localStorage-only; HTMX-fetches-JSON vs server-renders-from-service-layer; thin-JS vs heavier client store.
acceptance_criteria: An accepted ADR exists describing the auth/render approach; it explains JWT-in-localStorage handling, HTMX Authorization injection, and the __conduit_debug__ contract; page beads can implement against it unambiguously.

title: Verify: Tags Hurl suite green
description:
Run tags.hurl against the backend.

## Required Skills
Hurl
acceptance_criteria: tags.hurl passes with all assertions.

title: Verify: Comments Hurl suite green
description:
Run comments.hurl + errors_comments.hurl + errors_authorization.hurl against the backend.

## Required Skills
Hurl
acceptance_criteria: comments.hurl, errors_comments.hurl, errors_authorization.hurl all pass.

title: Verify: Favorites Hurl suite green
description:
Run favorites.hurl against the backend.

## Required Skills
Hurl
acceptance_criteria: favorites.hurl passes with all assertions.

title: Verify: Articles Hurl suite green
description:
Run articles.hurl + errors_articles.hurl + pagination.hurl + feed.hurl against the backend.

## Required Skills
Hurl
acceptance_criteria: articles.hurl, errors_articles.hurl, pagination.hurl, feed.hurl all pass.

title: Verify: Profiles Hurl suite green
description:
Run profiles.hurl + errors_profiles.hurl against the backend.

## Required Skills
Hurl
acceptance_criteria: profiles.hurl and errors_profiles.hurl pass with all assertions.

title: Verify: Auth Hurl suite green
description:
Run specs/api/hurl/auth.hurl + errors_auth.hurl against the running backend; all assertions pass.

## Required Skills
Hurl
acceptance_criteria: HOST=.../api hurl auth.hurl and errors_auth.hurl exit 0 with all assertions passing.

title: JWT auth infrastructure + current-user dependency
description:
Password hashing (passlib), JWT issue/verify (PyJWT) reading 'Authorization: Token <jwt>', and FastAPI dependencies get_current_user (required) and get_optional_user (optional/anonymous). Token returned in User payload.

## Required Skills
JWT, passlib, FastAPI deps
acceptance_criteria: Hashing + verify works; valid token resolves to a user; missing/invalid token -> 401 via required dep; optional dep yields None anonymously; 'Token <jwt>' header scheme honored.

title: Error handling: GenericErrorModel + status codes
description:
Central exception handling producing the GenericErrorModel format {errors:{field:[msgs]}} and correct status codes: 401 (token missing/invalid), 403 (forbidden, key=resource), 404 (not found, key=resource), 409 (conflict, e.g. username taken), 422 (validation, field keys). Matches errors_*.hurl expectations.

## Required Skills
FastAPI exception handlers
acceptance_criteria: 401/403/404/409/422 each return the documented JSON shape and key conventions; validation errors map to field keys; matches errors-* test expectations.

title: Pydantic schemas + response envelopes
description:
Pydantic models for request/response matching openapi.yml: User, Profile, Article, Comment, Tag, plus the wrapping envelopes ({user},{profile},{article},{articles,articlesCount},{comment(s)},{tags}). Enforce null normalization (empty bio/image -> null).

## Required Skills
Pydantic v2
acceptance_criteria: Serializers emit exactly the OpenAPI field sets + envelopes; empty-string bio/image normalize to null; tagList/following/favorited/favoritesCount present.

title: Domain models (User, Follow, Article, Tag, Comment, Favorite)
description:
SQLAlchemy models: User(username unique, email unique, bio nullable, image nullable, password_hash); Follow(follower,followed); Article(slug unique, title, description, body, author_fk, timestamps); Tag + Article-Tag M2M; Comment(body, author_fk, article_fk, timestamps); Favorite(user,article). Relationships + constraints for favoritesCount, following, tagList.

## Required Skills
SQLAlchemy 2.0, data modeling
acceptance_criteria: All entities + relationships defined; unique constraints on username/email/slug; nullable bio/image; M2M tags and favorites/follows expressed.

title: PostgreSQL + SQLAlchemy 2.0 engine/session
description:
Configure async/sync SQLAlchemy 2.0 engine + session factory + declarative Base, reading DATABASE_URL from env; provide a session dependency for FastAPI.

## Required Skills
SQLAlchemy 2.0, PostgreSQL
acceptance_criteria: App connects to Postgres; a session dependency yields a working session; declarative Base exported for models.

title: Scaffold FastAPI monorepo + tooling
description:
Create the monorepo skeleton: /backend (api, models, services, core) and /frontend (templates, static, routes) under one FastAPI app; pyproject with FastAPI, uvicorn, SQLAlchemy 2.0, Alembic, PyJWT/passlib, Jinja2, httpx; lint/format config; app entrypoint mounting /api routers and HTML routes.

## Required Skills
Python, FastAPI, packaging
acceptance_criteria: uvicorn boots the app; GET /api/health (or root) returns 200; /backend and /frontend packages import cleanly; dependency lockfile committed.

title: M2: Frontend spec-compliant
description: Coordination gate: the frontend passes the full specs/e2e Playwright suite against the running backend. ## Success Criteria: frontend e2e verify-task closed; full Playwright suite green in CI. Depends on M1.

title: M1: Backend spec-compliant
description: Coordination gate: the backend passes the full specs/api Hurl suite. ## Success Criteria: all six resource verify-tasks closed; full Hurl suite green in CI.

title: Foundations & Project Scaffold
description: Shared base for the fullstack Conduit app: a single FastAPI service (PostgreSQL + SQLAlchemy 2.0 + Alembic + PyJWT) that serves both the JSON API and a Jinja2+HTMX UI. Monorepo: /backend and /frontend source trees. ## Success Criteria: app boots; Postgres connected; ORM models + migrations applied; Pydantic envelopes + GenericErrorModel error format in place; JWT auth dependency available; Hurl test harness wired. All child beads closed.

title: Gate: gh:run
description:
Ad-hoc gate blocking conduit-m2

Reason: Frontend Playwright suite must be green in CI before M2 is satisfied

title: Gate: gh:run
description:
Ad-hoc gate blocking conduit-m1

Reason: Backend Hurl suite must be green in CI before M1 is satisfied

title: URL/deep-link navigation
description:
Deep links, back/forward, and query-param state (feed/page/tag) work directly; auth redirects for protected routes.

## Required Skills
FastAPI, routing
acceptance_criteria: Direct navigation to every route works; query params restore state; protected routes redirect unauthenticated users; matches url-navigation.spec + navigation.spec.

title: XSS-safe rendering
description:
Ensure user content (titles, bodies, comments, bios, markdown) is escaped/sanitized so no script injection occurs.

## Required Skills
security, templating
acceptance_criteria: Malicious payloads in article/comment/profile fields are neutralized (no script execution); matches xss-security.spec.

title: Error-handling UI
description:
Consistent surfacing of API/validation/auth/network errors into .error-messages; handling of 401/403/404/422 and user-fetch failures across pages.

## Required Skills
Jinja2, HTMX
acceptance_criteria: Validation/API errors render in .error-messages; 404/unauthorized states handled gracefully; matches error-handling.spec + user-fetch-errors.spec.

title: Profile page (+ favorites tab, follow)
description:
/profile/:username (+/favorites): .profile-page/.user-info/.user-img, Follow/Unfollow button, 'Edit Profile Settings' for self, tabs for authored vs 'Favorited' articles.

## Required Skills
Jinja2, HTMX
acceptance_criteria: Profile shows user info + avatar; My Articles vs Favorited tabs list correctly; follow/unfollow toggles; self sees Edit Profile Settings; matches social.spec.

title: Article detail (+ comments UI)
description:
/article/:slug: .article-page/.article-meta/.article-content (client-rendered markdown), Favorite/Unfavorite (.btn-outline-primary/.btn-primary), Follow/Unfollow, Edit Article/Delete Article for author; comments: .comment-form textarea[placeholder='Write a comment...'], Post Comment, .card .card-block, .mod-options .ion-trash-a delete for comment author.

## Required Skills
Jinja2, HTMX
acceptance_criteria: Article renders markdown; favorite/follow toggle classes/text; author sees Edit/Delete; comments post/list/delete (author-only) with correct selectors; matches articles.spec + comments.spec + social.spec.

title: Editor: edit article
description:
/editor/:slug: pre-filled form; only author; updates article (slug may change) and redirects to detail.

## Required Skills
Jinja2, HTMX
acceptance_criteria: Author edits load pre-filled, save, and redirect to (possibly new) slug; non-author cannot edit; matches articles.spec.

title: Editor: new article
description:
/editor: input[name=title], input[name=description], textarea[name=body], input[placeholder='Enter tags'], 'Publish Article'; on publish redirect to /article/:slug.

## Required Skills
Jinja2, HTMX
acceptance_criteria: Publishing creates an article and navigates to its detail page; tags added; validation errors -> .error-messages; matches articles.spec.

title: Settings page (+ logout)
description:
/settings: inputs name=image/username/bio/email/password, 'Update Settings' button, 'Or click here to logout' (.btn-outline-danger); null normalization for bio/image.

## Required Skills
Jinja2, HTMX
acceptance_criteria: Updating settings persists via PUT /api/user and reflects on profile; empty bio/image normalize to null; logout clears jwtToken; matches settings.spec + null-fields.spec.

title: Register page
description:
/register: h1 'Sign up', input[name=username/email/password], submit; stores jwtToken on success; errors -> .error-messages.

## Required Skills
Jinja2, HTMX
acceptance_criteria: Valid registration creates+authenticates user, stores jwtToken; validation errors -> .error-messages; matches auth.spec.

title: Login page
description:
/login: h1 'Sign in', input[name=email], input[name=password], submit; stores jwtToken on success; errors -> .error-messages.

## Required Skills
Jinja2, HTMX
acceptance_criteria: Valid login authenticates, stores jwtToken, redirects home; invalid -> .error-messages; matches auth.spec.

title: Home: feeds, tags sidebar, pagination
description:
Home (/): .banner, .feed-toggle with Global Feed / Your Feed (.nav-link), .article-preview cards (.article-meta/.author/.preview-link), tag .sidebar with .tag-pill, .pagination/.page-item with active state; supports /?feed=following, /?page=N, /tag/:tag.

## Required Skills
Jinja2, HTMX
acceptance_criteria: Global + Your Feed render article previews; tag sidebar filters to /tag/:tag; pagination navigates with active page; empty state shows .empty-feed-message; matches articles.spec + navigation.spec.

title: window.__conduit_debug__ + localStorage token mgmt
description:
Implement window.__conduit_debug__ {getToken, getAuthState, getCurrentUser} per SELECTORS.md/helpers/debug.ts, and manage the jwtToken localStorage key on login/register/logout.

## Required Skills
JS
acceptance_criteria: __conduit_debug__.getToken/getAuthState/getCurrentUser return correct values across authenticated/unauthenticated/loading/unavailable; jwtToken set on login/register and cleared on logout.

title: Frontend routing for all SELECTORS routes
description:
Wire server HTML routes for every SELECTORS route: /, /?feed=following, /?page=N, /tag/:tag(+?page=N), /login, /register, /editor, /editor/:slug, /settings, /profile/:username(+/favorites), /article/:slug.

## Required Skills
FastAPI, routing
acceptance_criteria: Every SELECTORS route resolves to its page (or auth redirect); deep links and query params (feed/page/tag) handled; matches url-navigation.spec routing expectations.

title: Browser API client + JWT/HTMX header injection
description:
Client wrapper that calls the JSON API and injects 'Authorization: Token <jwt>' from localStorage jwtToken (incl HTMX hx-headers/config); centralizes error surfacing to .error-messages.

## Required Skills
JS, HTMX
acceptance_criteria: Authenticated requests include the Token header from localStorage; unauth requests omit it; API/validation errors render into .error-messages.

title: Base layout, navbar & shared CSS theme
description:
Jinja2 base template with .navbar/.navbar-brand/.nav-link, .container, footer; integrate the shared CSS theme (specs assets/theme/styles.css) so required SELECTORS classes render correctly; conditional nav for auth/anon (Home, Sign in/up, New Article, Settings, profile .user-pic).

## Required Skills
Jinja2, CSS
acceptance_criteria: Base layout renders with .navbar/.navbar-brand/.nav-link/.container; theme applied; nav reflects auth state with required links/text; matches navigation.spec expectations for the shell.

title: GET /api/tags — List tags
description:
Return all tags used across articles. Auth not required.

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: Returns {tags:[...]} including tags created on articles; no auth needed; covered by tags.hurl.

title: DELETE /api/articles/:slug/comments/:id — Delete comment
description:
Delete a comment. Auth + comment-author-only. 204. Selective deletion leaves others.

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: Author delete -> 204, others remain; non-author -> 403; no auth -> 401; unknown article/comment -> 404; covered by comments.hurl + errors_comments.hurl + errors_authorization.hurl.

title: GET /api/articles/:slug/comments — List comments
description:
List comments for an article. Auth optional. Unknown article 404.

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: Returns {comments} for the article (authed or anon); unknown article -> 404; covered by comments.hurl + errors_comments.hurl.

title: POST /api/articles/:slug/comments — Add comment
description:
Add a comment to an article. Auth required. 201 + {comment}. Empty body 422, unknown article 404.

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: Authed comment -> 201 {comment} with author; no auth -> 401; empty body -> 422; unknown article -> 404; covered by comments.hurl + errors_comments.hurl.

title: DELETE /api/articles/:slug/favorite — Unfavorite
description:
Unfavorite an article. Auth required. Returns updated {article}.

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: Authed unfavorite -> 200 {article, favorited:false, favoritesCount-1}; no auth -> 401; unknown slug -> 404; persisted; covered by favorites.hurl + errors_articles.hurl.

title: POST /api/articles/:slug/favorite — Favorite
description:
Favorite an article. Auth required. Returns updated {article}.

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: Authed favorite -> 200 {article, favorited:true, favoritesCount+1}; idempotent count; no auth -> 401; unknown slug -> 404; covered by favorites.hurl + errors_articles.hurl.

title: GET /api/articles/feed — Personalized feed
description:
Articles from followed users, most-recent-first, with limit/offset. Auth required.

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: Authed feed returns only followed authors' articles, recent-first, paginated; empty for new user; no auth -> 401; covered by feed.hurl.

title: DELETE /api/articles/:slug — Delete article
description:
Delete an article. Auth + author-only. 204 on success.

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: Author delete -> 204 and gone; non-author -> 403; no auth -> 401; unknown -> 404; covered by articles.hurl + errors_articles.hurl + errors_authorization.hurl.

title: PUT /api/articles/:slug — Update article
description:
Update title/description/body. Auth + author-only. Slug regenerates when title changes. tagList: omitted preserves tags, [] clears, null rejected.

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: Author update persists; title change updates slug; omitted tagList preserves, [] removes, null -> 422/rejected; non-author -> 403; unknown -> 404; covered by articles.hurl + errors_articles.hurl + errors_authorization.hurl.

title: GET /api/articles/:slug — Get article
description:
Fetch a single article by slug. Auth optional. 404 unknown slug.

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: Known slug -> 200 {article}; unknown -> 404; favorited/following reflect viewer; covered by articles.hurl + errors_articles.hurl.

title: GET /api/articles — List articles
description:
List articles, most-recent-first, with filters tag/author/favorited and limit/offset pagination. Auth optional (favorited/following reflect viewer).

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: Returns {articles, articlesCount}; filters by tag/author/favorited; limit/offset paginate correctly; ordering most-recent-first; covered by articles.hurl + pagination.hurl + favorites.hurl filters.

title: POST /api/articles — Create article
description:
Create an article (title,description,body,tagList?). Auth required. Generate unique slug (duplicate titles -> distinct slugs). 201 + {article}.

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: 201 {article} with slug/tagList/author/favorited=false/favoritesCount=0; duplicate titles get unique slugs; empty title/description/body -> 422; no auth -> 401; covered by articles.hurl + errors_articles.hurl.

title: DELETE /api/profiles/:username/follow — Unfollow
description:
Unfollow a user. Auth required. 404 unknown user.

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: Authed unfollow -> 200 {profile, following:false}; no auth -> 401; unknown -> 404; persisted; covered by profiles.hurl + errors_profiles.hurl.

title: POST /api/profiles/:username/follow — Follow
description:
Follow a user. Auth required. 404 unknown user.

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: Authed follow -> 200 {profile, following:true}; no auth -> 401; unknown user -> 404; covered by profiles.hurl + errors_profiles.hurl.

title: GET /api/profiles/:username — Get profile
description:
Return a profile; auth optional (following reflects viewer). 404 unknown user.

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: Known profile -> 200 {profile} with correct following for authed/anon viewer; unknown -> 404; covered by profiles.hurl + errors_profiles.hurl.

title: PUT /api/user — Update current user
description:
Update email/username/password/bio/image. Null/empty normalization rules: empty bio/image -> null; null bio/image accepted; empty/null email/username/password rejected; password length rules.

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: Partial updates persist; empty bio/image normalize to null; null bio/image accepted; empty/null email/username/password -> 422; covered by auth.hurl + errors_auth.hurl.

title: GET /api/user — Current user
description:
Return the currently authenticated user. Auth required.

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: Valid token -> 200 with current User; missing/invalid token -> 401; covered by auth.hurl + errors_auth.hurl.

title: POST /api/users/login — Login
description:
Authenticate existing user (email,password). 200 + {user} incl token; 401/422 on bad/empty creds.

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: Correct creds -> 200 User+token; wrong password -> 401/422; empty email/password -> 422; covered by auth.hurl + errors_auth.hurl.

title: POST /api/users — Register
description:
Register a new user (username,email,password). 201 + {user} incl token; 409 on duplicate username/email; 422 on empty fields.

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: Valid registration returns 201 with User envelope + JWT; duplicate username/email -> 409; empty username/email/password -> 422; covered by auth.hurl + errors_auth.hurl.

title: API test harness: wire Hurl runner + CI job
description:
Wire specs/api/run-api-tests-hurl.sh against the running backend (HOST=.../api) and add a CI job that boots Postgres+app and runs the Hurl suite. This harness is what the resource verify-tasks invoke.

## Required Skills
Hurl, CI
acceptance_criteria: HOST=http://localhost:8000/api ./run-api-tests-hurl.sh runs against the app; CI job exists and can execute the suite (may be red until endpoints land).

title: docker-compose (Postgres) + dev runner + env config
description:
docker-compose with Postgres; .env handling (DATABASE_URL, JWT secret); a make/script target to run migrations then start uvicorn.

## Required Skills
Docker, env config
acceptance_criteria: docker compose up starts Postgres; documented one-command dev run boots the app against it; env vars documented.

title: Alembic init + initial migration
description:
Initialize Alembic against the models and generate the initial migration creating all tables/constraints/indexes.

## Required Skills
Alembic
acceptance_criteria: alembic upgrade head creates the full schema on a clean Postgres DB; downgrade works; migration committed.

title: Frontend Pages
description: All Conduit pages per SELECTORS.md routes, satisfying the Playwright e2e contract. ## Success Criteria: every page implemented with required selectors/text; each page's Playwright spec passes locally.

title: Frontend Foundations
description: Jinja2+HTMX rendering base served by the same FastAPI app: base layout (navbar/.container/footer), shared CSS theme, browser API client with JWT-from-localStorage, the window.__conduit_debug__ contract, routing, and default-avatar handling. Built against the OpenAPI contract in parallel with the backend. ## Success Criteria: base layout renders with required SELECTORS classes; API client injects Authorization from localStorage jwtToken; __conduit_debug__ implemented; all SELECTORS routes resolve; ADR accepted.

title: Backend: Tags
description: List tags. ## Success Criteria: GET /api/tags implemented; tags.hurl passes.

title: Backend: Comments
description: Add/list/delete comments with author-only authorization. ## Success Criteria: 3 endpoints implemented; comments.hurl, errors_comments.hurl, errors_authorization.hurl pass.

title: Backend: Favorites
description: Favorite/unfavorite an article. ## Success Criteria: 2 endpoints implemented; favorites.hurl passes.

title: Backend: Articles
description: Create/list/get/update/delete articles + personalized feed, slug generation, tag handling, filters, pagination. ## Success Criteria: 6 endpoints implemented; articles.hurl, errors_articles.hurl, pagination.hurl, feed.hurl pass.

title: Backend: Profiles & Following
description: Get profile, follow, unfollow. ## Success Criteria: 3 endpoints implemented; profiles.hurl and errors_profiles.hurl pass.

title: Backend: User & Authentication
description: Register, login, current-user, update-user endpoints per OpenAPI + endpoints.md. ## Success Criteria: all 4 endpoints implemented; auth.hurl and errors_auth.hurl pass.

title: Health check endpoint/page
description:
Health route the e2e suite expects to confirm the app is up.

## Required Skills
FastAPI
acceptance_criteria: Health check returns the expected up signal; matches health.spec.

title: Default-avatar handling
description:
When a user/author image is null/empty, avatar img src must contain default-avatar.svg across .user-img/.user-pic/.comment-author-img/.article-meta img.

## Required Skills
Jinja2
acceptance_criteria: Null/empty image renders an src containing default-avatar.svg in all avatar locations; matches null-fields.spec avatar expectations.

title: CORS configuration
description:
Configure CORS middleware permissive enough for the e2e/demo frontends per docs/backend/cors.md.

## Required Skills
FastAPI middleware
acceptance_criteria: Cross-origin requests from the frontend origin succeed; preflight handled.
